raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weens Dshwołłis buhs
par Pawehni Deena prett Kar-
stunu/ un par Gelbefchann un
par Patwerunu prett Ankeem
un Leetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ es dseedaschu
mannam Mihligam
weennu Dseesmu manna
Dranga no winna Wihna-
Dahrsa: Mannam Mihligam
irr Wihna-Dahrs tauka Pa-
kafnā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch irr to ar Sch-
tu aptaiſijs/ un ar Akminieem
ſtiprinajs/ un irr eekſch winna
krabtchaus Wihna-Kohkus deh
ſtijs/ un irr widdu eekſch ta
weenu Turni ustaiſijs/ ir weenu
Wihna-Spaidu eekſcha razziſ/
un gaidijs ka tas (labbus) Oh-
ga Rekkarus nestu/ bet wiꞥſch
neffe japnuſchus Rekkarus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad juhs Eedsihwotaji
eekſch Jerusalemes/ un juhs
Wihrī no Juhda/ teefajeet jelle
ſtarp man/ un ſtarp mannu
Wihna-Dahrsu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "ko bij wairak darriht pee
manna Wihna-Dahrsa neka es
efinu darrijs? Kapehz eſmu es
gaidijs ka tas (labbus) Ohga
Rekkarus nestu/ un wiꞥſch irr fa-
puuschus Rekkarus nestis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ es ſtahſtischu
juins/ ko es ar fawn Wihna-
Dahrsu darriſchn. Es atkeim-
schu winna Sehtu/ ka tas tohp
no-ehsts/ es pehſtischu winna
Muhti/ ka tas tohp famihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es darriſchu winnu par
pohstu Weetu/ wiꞥſch ne taps
apgreests nedg apkappahts/ bet
Dadscht un Ehrſtchi tur us-
dihgs/ un es pawehleſchu tahin
Padebbeſim/ ka winnahm us to
wiﬀat ne buhs liht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teescham/ tas Wihna-
Dahrs ta KUNGA Zebnot irr
tas Israeta Nams/ un tee Wihrī
no Juda irr tee Eedehſt win-
na Eelihgsmochanas. Wiꞥſch
gaida us Teetu/ un raugi/ tas
irr plehſiag Warras-Darbs/ us
Taiſnibu/ un raugi/ ta irr Waidi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Waj teem! kas weenn
Nammu pee ohtra welk/ weenu
Tihrumu pee ohtra krabj/ ka-
mehr nefahdas Weetas wairs
atleek/ ka juhs tikkat par Eedsih-
wotajecm ween tai Semmē toh-
pat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS Zebnot irr
preeksch mannahn Auxim (ſaz-
zijs): Teescham/ tee dauds Nam-
mi buhs par Pohſtischann/ tee
leelee un ſkaistce bes Eedsihwo-
taja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teescham Defimits Wih-
na-Dahrsa Birsumi neſihs
weenu weenigu Battu/ un weens
Gomers Schlas neſihs weenu
Eepu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Waj teem! kas agri zeh-
lufbces
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
